title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 58.070 - Failure to give bond — office vacated
text:
58.070.  Failure to give bond — office vacated. — If a coroner neglect to give bond and qualify within twenty days after his election, or shall fail to give bond when required under the preceding section, his office shall be deemed vacant.
(RSMo 1939 § 13230) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 11611; 1919 § 5919; 1909 § 2924
